content.text:
{
  "dimension": "coaching-stance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach operates from VIEW throughout. Turn 2 demonstrates impartiality and refusal of agenda — declining to issue a verdict — while still being warm rather than withholding. Turn 4 shows wonder for the actual phenomenon (the mountain itself), not a strategic probe. Turn 6 reflects genuine noticing of a felt shift rather than performed validation. Turn 8 is a single, clean question held in openness. Turn 10 lands with empathy and precision without preaching. The coach never debates the selfishness question on its terms, never jumps to partner-empathy or spiritual reframing, and trusts the want at the end rather than policing it. Pace slows when the client softens (turn 5-6) and the coach matches stillness with stillness. Vulnerability is the one slightly lighter component — the coach doesn't disclose their own state — but the undefended, non-agenda quality is consistent enough that this still reads as a 3.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses the verdict question without coldness — impartiality without apathy."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Wonder for the actual place; redirects from gate-keeping to lived want."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Notices the somatic/voice shift in real time rather than summarizing feeling words."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Single clean question, held in openness, no stacking."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Empathic precision — names what the 'selfish' question is doing without preaching."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays with the body; doesn't rush to insight."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Trusts the want; doesn't moralize or qualify it."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "childhood-imprinting", "linguistic-caveat"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want"],
  "notes": "Vulnerability (first-person coach disclosure) is the lightest VIEW component here, but the undefended, agenda-free quality is strong enough that 3 still fits better than 2."
}
